subcodes.first_line: O thou enraptured one! Blessed art thou, blessed art thou, for in the Promised Day, in the appointed garden, thou didst walk in the company [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خمار ای خوشا بحال تو ای خوشا بحال تو که در یوم موعود بباغ معهود در رکاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
